message:
fix(review): restrict raw SQL API surface and improve doctor repair robustness

- Change execute_raw, execute_raw_query, execute_raw_count from pub to
  pub(crate) to prevent future SQL injection surface from external callers
- Log errors from fs::remove_file during doctor --repair instead of
  silently discarding them (corrupt DB might not be removable)
- Remove redundant FK disable/enable in doctor repair -- import_from_jsonl
  manages its own FK deferral internally, so the outer FK management was
  a no-op (import re-enables FKs before returning)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
